result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could bridge divides, reduce conflict, and foster cooperation on a global scale. It would mean people could no longer ignore the suffering of others, whether due to poverty, war, or injustice, because they would feel it as if it were their own. Decisions, from personal interactions to international policies, would be made with a deeper consideration of their impact on others. I believe this could fundamentally shift how humanity operates, prioritizing connection over division, and compassion over indifference.
